message:
test(engine): expanded integration and unit tests across all subsystems

New and enhanced tests covering recent hardening and feature work:

- module_async_evaluation_integration: verify rejected dependency propagation,
  AwaitingDependencies phase for sync modules, and event emission order
- module_compatibility_matrix + enrichment + integration: test non-empty
  divergence reason/impact validation, enrichment pipeline, and end-to-end
  matrix validation with waivers
- versioned_rewrite_pack_integration: test interference metadata validation
  against actual pack rule IDs, ensuring phantom rules are rejected
- engine_product_blocker_ledger: new assertions for blocker ledger gate
- frankenctl_cli: expanded CLI workflow coverage
- observability_publication_bundle_integration: publication bundle tests
- rgc_certified_optimization_harness: expanded optimization harness replay
- rgc_security_enforcement_verification_pack: expanded security gate tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
